title: poa cumingii
intro: Poa cumingii, also known as the Cuming's grass or Cuming's blue grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa cumingii include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
